author: lOrm
content: Issue calls for ed25519 plugin-manifest signature verification (crate selection, signature shape, trusted-key config, verify_plugin_signature, PluginManager wiring, CLI plugin trust-key/list/revoke). Per the 2026-05-19 result comment on #249, Phase 1 (ed25519-dalek added, signed-manifest scheme implemented) landed. The CLI surface (trust-key / trust-list / trust-revoke) and the require_signatures policy enforcement remain. Tracked under cc-plugins-skills going forward; the residual CLI/policy delta will land with the wider plugin-policy work (#664 managed skills, #658 delisting). Closing the cleanup-pass ticket.
